statement: A shopper discovers, configures, purchases, receives, and can recover or return an evidence-backed product in a bounded local Amazon shopping simulation. The freeze covers anonymous Singapore/USD source evidence plus local account journeys; it explicitly denies whole-marketplace or whole-site fidelity.
out_of_scope: advertising auctions, telemetry, anti-bot systems, and source-site personalization beyond the frozen context
real payment authorization, capture, card data, or funds movement
real carrier, fulfillment, seller, return receipt, or refund operations
opt-in external SMTP delivery beyond the default local-only release profile; the adapter is retained but not certified by browser/resource network evidence
unobserved variant cross-products, marketplace-wide inventory, and continuously changing offers
Prime Video and other non-shopping ecosystems beyond explicit static placeholders
